  • Hill Shade with Neural Networks: Paper on cartographic relief shading using neural networks. Video deep learning, cartography, hillshade, neural network, visualization

  • CloudSen12 - Cloud Detection for Sentinel: Deep learning dataset and models for cloud detection in Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2 imagery. deep learning, cloud detection, Sentinel-2, dataset

  • Satellite Image Time Series Annotated Datasets: Collection of annotated datasets for satellite image time series deep learning research. deep learning, time series, satellite imagery, dataset, annotation

  • DeepWater: Deep learning model for global surface water mapping from satellite imagery. deep learning, water mapping, global, satellite imagery

• The Technical Debt of Earth Embedding Products: Examines fragmentation and interoperability challenges in Earth embedding products, arguing that standardizing how embeddings are distributed, stored, and accessed is the real bottleneck for geospatial foundation models. embeddings, geospatial, foundation models, interoperability, technical debt, cloud native

• GeoVibes: A geospatial tool for evaluating embedding models through interactive similarity search, using geoparquet and Python for nearest-neighbor queries and binary classifier training with spatial cross-validation. embeddings, geospatial, similarity search, geoparquet, Python, classification

  • SkyScript: A large, semantically diverse image-text dataset for remote sensing containing 5.2 million image-text pairs with 29,000+ semantic tags, designed for vision-language model (CLIP) development. VLM, CLIP, satellite imagery, text, remote sensing, embeddings, dataset

  • Scalable Geospatial Data Generation Using AlphaEarth Foundations Model: Paper on using AlphaEarth foundation model embeddings for transfer learning in forest monitoring applications. foundation model, embeddings, AlphaEarth, forest, transfer learning

  • TESSERA: Temporal Embeddings of Surface Spectra for Earth Representation and Analysis: Foundation model paper generating 128-dimensional embeddings from satellite time-series for land classification and canopy height prediction at 10-meter global resolution. foundation model, embeddings, time series, Sentinel-2, land classification, canopy height

  • TESSERA GitHub: Open-source implementation of the TESSERA foundation model that processes satellite time-series imagery to generate embeddings for Earth observation tasks. foundation model, embeddings, satellite, Python, open source

  • What Do Embeddings Actually Encode in Earth Observation Foundation Models?: LinkedIn post discussing what semantic information EO foundation model embeddings actually capture. embeddings, foundation models, Earth observation, semantics

  • Air Quality Using Satellite Embedding: Preprint on using satellite-derived embeddings for air quality estimation and monitoring. air quality, satellite, embeddings, remote sensing

  • Text Embeddings for Semantic Search with Overture: Research on text embedding-based semantic search over Overture Maps places dataset. embeddings, semantic search, Overture Maps, NLP, geospatial

  • OSM Embeddings - SRAI: SRAI (Spatial Representations for AI) Python library for geospatial machine learning on vector geometries, enabling spatial data download, regionalization, and vector embeddings for ML tasks. OSM, embeddings, spatial AI, Python, geospatial ML

docs.title: Delete Git History (Orphan Branch Method)
docs.text:
Video Tutorial on deleting Git history using orphan branches.

git checkout gh-pages
git checkout --orphan last
git add -A
git commit -am 'fresh init'
git branch -D gh-pages
git branch -m gh-pages
git push -f origin gh-pages
git gc --aggressive --prune=all
Keywords: Git, history, orphan branch, clean, GitHub Pages

docs.title: Find buildings NOT within 30m of other buildings
docs.text:
SELECT a.fid, a.geometry as geometry
FROM parcels a
LEFT JOIN parcels b
ON st_intersects(st_buffer(a.geometry, 30), b.geometry)
   AND NOT(st_equals(a.geometry, b.geometry))
WHERE b.geometry IS NULL
Keywords: SQL, PostGIS, spatial SQL, buffer, GIS
